initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT COUNT(client.client_id) AS count
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN account ON disp.account_id = account.account_id
WHERE client.gender = 'F' AND account.district_id = (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A2 = 'Jesenik');

JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
WHERE client.gender = 'F' AND district.A2 = 'Jesenik';
